user.title: TCL Intelligent AC
user.description: Choose how to add already-paired TCL Intelligent AC devices. Local discovery is recommended when Home Assistant can reach the ACs on your LAN.

cloud.title: Cloud-assisted setup
cloud.description: Log in once to fetch device MAC addresses and keys from Intelligent AC. The password is not stored and runtime control remains local.

local_discovery.title: Local discovery
local_discovery.description: Discover already-paired TCL Intelligent AC devices on the local network and fetch their local keys without using an Intelligent AC account. The options below are optional; leave them unchanged unless automatic discovery misses a device.

data_description.seed_hosts: Enter one or more device IP addresses, for example 192.168.1.50, 192.168.1.51. Use this if automatic discovery does not find all devices.
data_description.scan_subnet: Try each address on Home Assistant's local /24 network. This is useful when broadcast discovery is blocked or incomplete.

select.title: Select devices
select.description: Choose which Intelligent AC devices to add to Home Assistant.

select_local.title: Select LAN devices
select_local.description: Choose which locally discovered devices to add to Home Assistant. Local discovery uses the device name reported by the Wi-Fi module, which may differ from the friendly name in the mobile app.

dhcp_confirm.title: Discovered TCL Intelligent AC
dhcp_confirm.description: Home Assistant discovered {name} at {host} ({mac}). Submit to add it using local LAN control.

manual.title: Manual setup
manual.description: Add a TCL Intelligent AC device by entering known local LAN details.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the device with these details.
error.cloud_error: Could not log in or fetch devices from Intelligent AC. Check the Home Assistant log for the exact cloud response.
error.invalid_auth: The Intelligent AC login service rejected these credentials.
error.too_many_attempts: The Intelligent AC login service temporarily blocked login attempts. Wait a while and try again.
error.discovery_error: LAN discovery failed. Check the Home Assistant log for details.
error.host_not_found: The device was found in the account, but its LAN host could not be resolved.
error.no_devices: No supported TCL AC devices were found in this account.
error.no_lan_devices: No supported TCL AC devices could be discovered and authenticated on the LAN.
error.all_devices_configured: All discovered devices are already configured.
error.locked_device: A TCL AC was discovered, but it reports LOCKED=True and blocked local authentication. Disable any BroadLink-style Lock device setting, or perform a deeper Wi-Fi module/factory reset and try again.

abort.not_supported: No supported TCL Intelligent AC device could be authenticated at this address.
abort.locked_device: The discovered TCL AC reports LOCKED=True and blocks local authentication.
